creator: gljennjohn@gmail.com
text:
Including amdtemp in the kernel configuration file for FreeBSD-15 results in a kernel panic at boot time.

A git bisect identified commit 9a7add6d01f3c5f7eba811e794cf860d2bce131d as the cause.  This commit was made by Colin Percival on August 19, 2023, after FreeBSD-15 was created, so this probably only affects FreeBSD-15 itself.

A user reported on current.freebsd.org that reverting this commit resolves the panic problem.

A workaround is to kldload amdsmn.ko and amdtemp.ko.
